title: Java Localization
description: Format currency and percentage values for a specific locale.
learningGoals: Select a Locale and build locale-aware NumberFormat instances.
Format currency and percentage values according to the locale's conventions.

completionChecks.explanation: The BCP 47 language tag selects a specific language and region for locale-sensitive formatting.
getCurrencyInstance creates a formatter that applies the locale's currency formatting conventions.
A percent formatter multiplies 0.5 by 100 and applies the locale's percent symbol.
